profile.belief: Music's only truly working when it makes someone sit inside a feeling they normally flee from.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to transform avoidance into stillness, inviting others to embrace their inner landscapes through the power of sound.
